## Summary

Describe the change in 2-5 sentences. Focus on user-visible or system-visible impact.

## Linked Issue

Closes #

## Why This Change

Explain the intent this PR preserves or advances.

## Scope Check

- [ ] The PR matches the linked issue scope.
- [ ] Out-of-scope work was avoided or called out explicitly.
- [ ] Any open ambiguity is documented below.

## AI Assistance Report

- Tools used:
- What the AI tools helped with:
- What the human explicitly reviewed or corrected:

## Validation Evidence

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] Additional evidence is included below if needed

Add the relevant output, screenshots, logs, or reasoning:

## Reviewer Focus

Call out the areas that need the most scrutiny:

- alignment with original intent
- architectural risk
- integration risk
- missing tests
- unclear assumptions

## Escalations or Open Questions

Document unresolved ambiguity, tradeoffs, or follow-up decisions.
